topic.title: 1. Research Topics
topic.topicPlaceholder: Any questions you want to know...

presets.marketPrompt: Map the current market landscape for [your topic]. Compare major vendors, pricing models, market share trends, and key risks over the next 12 months.
presets.technicalPrompt: Perform a technical deep dive on [your topic]. Explain architecture options, implementation tradeoffs, performance constraints, and recommended rollout strategy.
presets.comparisonPrompt: Compare the top solutions for [your topic]. Build a decision matrix covering features, cost, integration effort, security/compliance, and long-term maintainability.

feedback.title: 2. Ask Question
feedback.feedbackPlaceholder: You can answer whatever you want...

searchResult.title: 3. Information Collection
searchResult.suggestionPlaceholder: Whether to add or adjust research directions...
searchResult.taskSearchPlaceholder: Search tasks by topic or goal...
searchResult.noFilteredTasks: No tasks match the current filters.

finalReport.title: 4. Final Report
finalReport.emptyTip: Waiting for data to be collated...
finalReport.writingRequirementPlaceholder: You can raise any request related to report writing.

history.title: History
history.description: Research history is stored locally in the browser, and only save completed research.
history.name: Title

knowledge.title: Local Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: A knowledge base stored locally in the browser.
knowledge.name: Name
knowledge.webCrawlerTip: The web crawler obtains the page content of the specified URL through server and returns the data in Markdown format.
knowledge.addResourceMessage: {{title}} has been added to the resource.

editor.placeholder: Please enter text, or enter "/ " to use commands

setting.title: Setting
setting.description: All settings are saved in the user's browser.
setting.providerTip: AI service provider. For AI aggregation services such as One Api and New Api, please select `Compatible OpenAI`.
setting.modeTip: In local mode, all requests are sent directly by the browser. In proxy mode, all requests are forwarded through the server.
setting.apiKeyPlaceholder: Please enter the model API key
setting.apiUrlPlaceholder: Please enter the API base URL
setting.accessPasswordPlaceholder: Please enter the server access password
setting.accessPasswordTip: Server-side API authentication prevents API from being misused by external applications.
setting.thinkingModelTip: The core model used in deep research, it is recommended to use the thinking model.
setting.networkingModelTip: The model used for secondary tasks, high output models are recommended.
setting.webSearchTip: Web search can obtain the latest data and help reduce model `hallucinations`. It is recommended to enable it.
setting.searchProviderTip: Search service providers. Some models have built-in network search capabilities, while most models need to rely on third-party search engines to achieve networking capabilities.
setting.parallelSearchTip: Parallel search helps speed up the data collection process, but too high a rate may trigger the model's request per minute limit.
setting.autoReviewRoundsTip: Automatically run additional review-and-search rounds after the first research pass. Set to 0 to disable.
setting.maxCollectionTopicsTip: Maximum number of information collection topics generated and researched in each round.
setting.searchResultsTip: The maximum number of web searches. Some search engines do not support this parameter.
setting.searchIncludeDomainsTip: Only keep search results from these domains. Supports comma, space, or newline separators. Applies to third-party search providers.
setting.searchExcludeDomainsTip: Exclude search results from these domains. Supports comma, space, or newline separators.
setting.languageTip: The system will automatically select the interface language based on the user's browser language.
setting.debugTip: System debugging can help users capture request exceptions and locate unknown errors. Normally, it does not need to be enabled.
setting.PWATip: A Progressive Web App is an application built using web platform technologies that provides a user experience close to that of native applications.
setting.resetAllSettings: Reset settings and clear the cache
setting.resetSettingWarning: This operation will clear all data and initialize the project.
setting.referencesTip: Enabling references will add reference links to search results and final reports via prompt. This may not work well for small models.
setting.citationImageTip: Enabling reference images will attempt to add content-related images to the final report through a prompt.
setting.textOutputModeTip: Text output effect of AI. Characters, output text like a typewriter. Words, output by word, the output is most efficient. Lines, the output effect is most stable.
setting.reportStyleTip: Controls how the final report is written.
setting.reportLengthTip: Controls the target depth of the final report.
setting.fileFormatResourceTip: Using file-format attachment can effectively reduce token usage and avoid exceeding the model's maximum context limit. This is only valid for models that support document understanding.
setting.useLocalResourceTip: When enabled, only local resources will be used for research and web crawling. No external network requests will be made.
setting.promptOverridesTip: Use a JSON object to override built-in deep research prompts. Only the provided keys are overridden.
setting.promptOverridesInvalid: Prompt overrides must be a valid JSON object.

thesis.title: Thesis Settings
thesis.citationStyleTip: Select the citation format standard for your thesis.
thesis.autoCitationsTip: Automatically add citation markers to report content.
thesis.exportBibTeXTip: Export citation library in BibTeX format.

standard.name: Standard Academic Paper
standard.description: Includes abstract, introduction, literature review, methodology, results, discussion, conclusion, and references

empirical.name: Empirical Research Paper
empirical.description: Focuses on data analysis and hypothesis testing

review.name: Literature Review
review.description: Systematic review and analysis of relevant literature

case.name: Case Study
case.description: In-depth analysis of a specific case or phenomenon

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.acceptTerms: Please accept the terms and privacy notice

feedback.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later
feedback.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send reset email, please try again later
feedback.resetEmailSent: If the email exists, we sent a reset link
feedback.resetEmailSentHint: If the email exists, we sent a reset link. Please check your inbox or try again later.
feedback.resetFailed: Password reset failed, please request a new link
feedback.resetSuccess: Password updated, please sign in again

layout.heroTitle: Academic writing starts with a traceable sign-in entry.
layout.heroDescription: Keep your research context, citation trail, and writing progress in one place. For now, only the email flow is enabled so the account system and workspace stay stable.
layout.noSso: Only email auth is enabled for now. Third-party SSO remains disabled.
layout.trackDescription: Finish account access first, then unlock billing, subscription, and quota modules step by step.

workspace.title: Research workspace
workspace.description: Resume your topics and history after sign-in, with one place for your research context.

evidence.title: Evidence trail
evidence.description: Track literature, images, webpages, and local files with a reviewable citation path.

output.title: Paper output
output.description: Turn research steps into structured reports and move steadily toward a final draft.

login.title: Sign in to your research workspace
login.description: Use your email account to continue the thesis, billing, and quota flow.

register.title: Create your research account
register.description: Connect the account layer first, then add billing, subscription, and quota modules.
register.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the terms of service and privacy notice.

forgot.title: Reset your sign-in password
forgot.description: Enter your email and we will send a password reset link to your inbox.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: After opening the email link, set a new password for your account here.
